arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Tottenham initiate talks to sign Angel Gomes
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are eager to sign Lille midfielder Angel Gomes on a free transfer this summer and they have already initiated talks with his representatives, FootballTransfers understands. The 24-year-old is set to become a free agent when his current contract at Lille expires at the end of June and several Premier League clubs are interested in signing him on a Bosman deal, including Manchester United and West Ham United.

arts.ttl: Guirassy and Kovac eager to "get back to being positive" ahead of Lille clash
arts.sum: BVB's head coach and marksman shared their thoughts ahead of their rematch with LOSC Lille.

arts.ttl: Can Raphinha or Serhou Guirassy break record? Most goal contributions in a Champions League season
arts.sum: The new Champions League format this season has been met with mixed reviews from supporters around Europe, but one thing it has guaranteed is more games. Which usually means more goals. There were...

arts.ttl: Tyler Adams, Gio Reyna return to USMNT squad for Concacaf Nations League
arts.sum: USMNT will play Panama in semi-final on 20 March Canada and Mexico are other teams in competition The US men’s national team have announced a 23-player roster for the Concacaf Nations League finals that features three players who will be in camp with head coach Mauricio Pochettino for the first time. The headliners among the trio are Tyler Adams and Gio Reyna. The players are considered to be key parts of the squad, but both last appeared with the US at the 2024 Copa América, where the team were eliminated in the group stage. Adams, who captained the US at the 2022 World Cup, underwent back surgery after the tournament and returned to action with Bournemouth late last year. Reyna has found consistent minutes hard to come by this season at Borussia Dortmund with the team struggling in the Bundesliga, although they made it through to the Champions League round of 16. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Adams, Reyna on US roster for first time under Pochettino, picked for CONCACAF Nations League games
arts.sum: Midfielders Tyler Adams and Gio Reyna, and defender Cameron Carter-Vickers were picked for the U.S. national team for the first time under coach Mauricio Pochettino, among 23 players selected Tuesday for the CONCACAF Nations League final four matches this month. Agyemang, Luna, Tim Ream, Patrick Schulte, Zack Steffen and Brian White are the six Major League Soccer players on the roster who were at the January training camp, which was not on FIFA international dates.

arts.ttl: Report: Marcel Sabitzer creates "bad energy" at Dortmund
arts.sum: Marcel Sabitzer is spoiling the atmosphere at Borussia Dortmund, according to Sky Germany.
